arguments.argument: event_inherited() instance_create(x,y,oBombBWave) image_speed=0.75 damageType="EXPLOSION" weaponTag=2 atkLv=global.stLink_Bomb[0] atkPower=220+(global.stLink_Bomb[0]*4)+(global.skillTree[9]*2) atkPower=weaponDmgMod(0,atkPower) stunTime=22+round(global.stLink_Bomb[0]/2) bCanPierce=1 image_xscale=1+(global.linkBombUpgrade*0.04) image_yscale=1+(global.linkBombUpgrade*0.04)
